short_intro: External relation seed for graph coverage review.

conversation_moves.overview: Use the person_to_work relation as a reviewed graph edge, not as a final answer.
conversation_moves.works_list: Use relation edges to support lists only after linked nodes are reviewed.
conversation_moves.representative_works: Do not treat a relation edge as representative status.
conversation_moves.entry_path: Use relation edges to choose bounded entry routes through reviewed nodes.
conversation_moves.explain_work: Explain via linked metadata and reviewed context; do not quote source text.
conversation_moves.compare: Compare both linked sides with an explicit relation axis.
conversation_moves.country_relation: Use country or institution relations only when reviewed metadata supports them.
conversation_moves.why_it_matters: Explain relation significance after review, not from metadata presence alone.
conversation_moves.quote_or_lyrics_boundary: No lyrics, long quotations, or raw source text; use relation labels only.

copyright_policy: Use relation metadata only; no lyrics or long quoted text.
not_to_infer: Do not infer importance from relation presence alone.
Do not use this edge in public runtime until reviewed.
